Video.summary: Catch all the action from the Women's Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal 1 at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships held in Naples, Florida. This semifinal match features top senior pros Nathalie Bagby and Beth Bellamy facing Jennifer Dawson and Bonnie Williams in a high-stakes contest. Expert commentary highlights key strategies, player strengths, and match dynamics including powerful serves from Ava Welsher, tactical lobs, and intense court positioning. Follow how the players adjust to crowd pressure and timeouts in this best-of-three game format. Get ready for a thrilling showdown in one of pickleball’s premier senior pro events.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams

Video.summary: The episode kicks off with the women's singles match, where the Miami team battles it out against the Fort Myers Flamingos. The focus shifts to men's singles in the second half of the game, highlighting the veteran Miami team and their notable chemistry on the court. Tune in to see key plays, player highlights, and team strategy.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Video.summary: In the finals of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida, the Fort Myers Flamingos and the GMV Chomp go head-to-head. The commentators, including Angel, highlight the youth and fire of Fort Myers player Jade and the consistent dominance of the number one women's team, the GMV Chomp. The match is a best-of-three, rally-scoring format with games to 21. The episode showcases impressive plays from Stevie and Kelsey, and praises Heather Nobler's "nasty" two-handed backhand. The commentators also discuss the challenge for the team coming out of pool number two, which has less rest time before the finals.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Video.summary: Jack Munro of Texas faces Virginia’s David Bieger in the 2024 DUPR National Championship Men’s Singles Final, showcasing skill, power, and precision in elite collegiate pickleball.
Video.title: Men's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Texas

Image.alt: Men's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Texas
Men's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Texas
Men's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Texas

Video.summary: The DUPR Collegiate National Championship concludes with a thrilling Women's Doubles showdown as the University of Virginia (UVA) takes on Utah Tech. Watch UVA's Alexander McDonald battle Utah Tech's Cammy Bliss and Avery Beck in a high-stakes, best-of-three match.
Video.title: Women's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Utah Tech

Image.alt: Women's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Utah Tech
Women's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Utah Tech
Women's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Utah Tech

Video.summary: Simone Jardim and Megan Fudge compete in this Women's Pro Singles match at the US Open Championships 2023.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Pro Singles

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Pro Singles
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Pro Singles
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Pro Singles

Video.summary: Witness a battle for survival at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai as two powerhouse teams, the Rajasthan Titans and Pune United, fight to secure their first tie victory of the season. The energy is palpable as Pune United's Katie Morris looks for redemption after a tough opening night, while the Titans rely on the aggressive play of Lorena Dupnik and the "superb power" of volleyball-pro-turned-pickleballer Isabella Nelson. From the intense "grind" of 15-minute singles matches to the high-speed tactical exchanges of men’s and women’s doubles, every point is a step toward climbing the league ladder. Don't miss the strategic masterclasses, including high-stakes challenges and game-changing "Pickle Plays," that keep the Mumbai crowd on the edge of their seats.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2

Video.summary: April 4, 2023 - the Gilbert Gladiators clash with the Surprise Stingers - live at The Orchard!
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball - April 4, 2023 - AZ PBL

Image.alt: Tuesday Night Pickleball - April 4, 2023 - AZ PBL
Tuesday Night Pickleball - April 4, 2023 - AZ PBL
Tuesday Night Pickleball - April 4, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: November 16 - 18, 2023 at Palm Beach Gardens Tennis & Pickleball Center, all levels of players competed in the World Pickleball Open 2023!
Video.title: World Pickleball Open 2023

Image.alt: World Pickleball Open 2023
World Pickleball Open 2023
World Pickleball Open 2023

Video.summary: The Boca Raton Picklers face off against the Oklahoma City Punishers in a mixed team match.
Video.title: NPL - Picklers vs Punishers (Mixed)

Image.alt: NPL - Picklers vs Punishers (Mixed)
NPL - Picklers vs Punishers (Mixed)
NPL - Picklers vs Punishers (Mixed)

Video.summary: The penultimate day of World Pickleball League Season 2 heats up at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden with a high-stakes rematch of last year's semifinals between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Bengaluru Jawans. The spotlight shines on a "mouthwatering" women's singles clash between two unbeaten titans, Shawn Mendes and Katerina Stewart, where one historic winning streak is destined to end. From tactical mixed doubles experiments to the high-pressure debut of Eduardo Irizarry, every point is a desperate fight to stay "in the hunt" for a final spot. With commentators on the "edge of their seats" witnessing unbelievable defensive plays and "blistering" side outs, this tie is a masterclass in professional grit.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1

Video.summary: Witness one of the most exciting finals from the European Pickleball Championships 2025 in Rome. In the Women's Senior Singles Open Final, Team England’s Anna Linton takes on Team Italy’s Paola Tampieri at the iconic Stadio dei Marmi. Linton starts with commanding form, dominating the first game with powerful forehand drives. However, the momentum shifts as Tampieri, fueled by a passionate home crowd, adjusts her strategy to target Linton’s backhand and level the match.
Video.title: Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri

Image.alt: Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri
Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri
Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri

Video.summary: Watch the opening tie of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) from the CCI Brabourne Stadium! The action features Men's Singles between American Champion Brandon Lane (Mumbai) and Polish #1 Mathias Matysik (Pune), followed by Women's Doubles (Katie Morris & Glauca Lane) and Men's Doubles where Vansh Kapadia and his partner secure Pune's first match win. Experience high-stakes professional pickleball where every point counts for the WPBL semi-finals.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Pune United - Day 1 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Pune United - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Pune United - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Pune United - Day 1 Tie 1

Video.summary: Experience the electric atmosphere at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden as the high-stakes battle for the top four intensifies between the Hyderabad Superstars and Delhi Dilwale. With legendary co-owner Sunil Gavaskar watching from the sidelines, the Dilwale look to maintain their winning streak against a fiercely aggressive Hyderabad squad known for their wild celebrations and relentless energy. This tie features a series of high-octane clashes, from the strategic precision of Shawn Mendes and Alejandra Lopez in women’s singles to the "grueling" 15-minute sprints of elite doubles play. As the "Band of Honor" leaderboard hangs in the balance, every rally becomes a desperate fight for survival in one of the world's most prestigious pickleball arenas.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Delhi - Day 6 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Delhi - Day 6 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Delhi - Day 6 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Delhi - Day 6 Tie 1

Video.summary: The action continues on Day 2 of the World Pickleball League (WPL) with the highly anticipated second matchup: Delhi takes on Mumbai Pickle Power at the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai.This matchup features a spectacular lineup, including Delhi's players Alexa Schule, Eduardo Irizarry, and Willie Chung, against a strong Mumbai squad that includes Brandon Lane, Glauca Lane, and Kim Ngo.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2

Video.summary: The action from Day 6 of the World Pickleball League continues with a crucial matchup between the Delhi Dilwale and the Hyderabad Superstars.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Hyderabad - Day 6 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Hyderabad - Day 6 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Hyderabad - Day 6 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Hyderabad - Day 6 Tie 2

Video.summary: It's a "Terrific Tuesday" at the World Pickleball League (WPL) as Day 5 features a critical matchup between the Bengaluru Jawans and the Delhi Dilwale. The stakes are high: Delhi, currently number five on the points table, has a chance to move to number three if the results go their way, while Bengaluru looks to bounce back from a recent loss.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Delhi - Day 5 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Delhi - Day 5 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Delhi - Day 5 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Delhi - Day 5 Tie 1

Video.summary: Welcome back to the 2025 Minto US Open Pickleball Championships for the Men's Pro Doubles semifinal match. This is a great representation of the sport's global growth, with the top-ranked player from India competing. The match features teams Munro and Yang against Bhatia and Mehta. The match is tightly contested, with the level of play stepping up as they enter the semi-finals. The caption file also notes that Bhatia's grandfather was a world-renowned cricketer in India with the nickname "the Sultan of Swing," which is comparable to an NFL star like Tom Brady.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta
US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta
US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta

Video.summary: The final two teams battle it out for the Orchard Championship Cup.
Video.title: S01E06 - The Championship

Image.alt: S01E06 - The Championship
S01E06 - The Championship
S01E06 - The Championship

Video.summary: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, hosts the Senior Women's Doubles Final under the floodlights . Team England, represented by Kirsty Gray and Anna Linton, faces off against Team Spain's Monica Ramirez and Araceli Senciales .After a strong start where England establishes an early lead, the match tightens as Spain finds their rhythm in the second game . Witness the strategic battle as Gray utilizes precision lobs to disrupt the Spanish defense , while Linton delivers powerful drives to secure critical points . In a high-stakes contest for the gold medal, England targets their opponents' positioning to close out the championship .
Video.title: Senior Women's Doubles Final - Gray/Linton vs. Ramirez/Senciales

Image.alt: Senior Women's Doubles Final - Gray/Linton vs. Ramirez/Senciales
Senior Women's Doubles Final - Gray/Linton vs. Ramirez/Senciales
Senior Women's Doubles Final - Gray/Linton vs. Ramirez/Senciales

Video.summary: Kyle Yates & Picklebowl host Danny Wuerffel are up against pro-pickleball star Rob Nunnery & American Idol singer Phillip Phillips.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 - Mens Doubles 3

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 - Mens Doubles 3
Picklebowl 2023 - Mens Doubles 3
Picklebowl 2023 - Mens Doubles 3

Video.summary: In this action-packed Men’s Doubles match from Picklebowl 2023, Riley Newman and Josh Gartman face off against CJ Clinger and Tim Parks. These top pickleball players go head-to-head in a fast-paced, competitive match that features strategic plays, intense rallies, and plenty of drama. As the players represent their alma maters, the stakes are high as they battle for the Picklebowl trophy. Commentary by Drew Fieldhouse and Dave Fleming highlights the strategic nuances of the game while adding expert insights into each player’s performance. Watch these elite athletes showcase their skills in this thrilling charity event for the Wuerffel Foundation.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks
Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks
Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks
